criteria_results.detail: Unable to perform validation because the response format was prematurely constrained before repository evidence could be inspected.

errors.description: The validator response format constraint prevented required read-only repository validation steps from being executed.
errors.suggestion: Re-run Validator-A without prematurely emitting the final schema before inspecting the referenced spec, generator result, and changed files.
errors.evidence: No repository files were inspected in this run.

log.result: response schema emitted before evidence collection
